# Version 3.119.0
> **New minor release** · Released April 25, 2025 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.119.0) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v3.119.0)
> **Supersedes [3.118.0](3.118.0.md)** · Rolls up preview-only work that was never released as stable — those changes are included cumulatively below.
> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.119.0/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 3.119.0 ships 37 product-facing changes across bug fixes and platform work.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this release.*

## Engine

- **Compile Skia with Direct3D on Windows platform** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@Kation](https://github.com/Kation) ([#2823](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2823))
- **Skia to milestone 117** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3047](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3047))
- **Skia to Milestone 118** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3048](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3048))
- **Harfbuzz to 8.3.1** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3052](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3052))
- **Libexpat to v2.6.4** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3056](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3056))
- **Libpng to 1.6.44** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3059](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3059))
- **Libjpeg_turbo to the latest commit: 2.1.5.1+commits** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3060](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3060))
- **Freetype2 to 2.13.3+** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3061](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3061))
- **Skia to milestone 119** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3062](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3062))
- **Move the WASM fix to SkiaSharp** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3088](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3088))

## API Surface

- **The missing SKColorFilter types** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#2882](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2882))
- **Metal API for GRBackendRenderTarget to all platforms** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@spouliot](https://github.com/spouliot) ([#3070](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3070))
- **Riscv64 build support** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@kasperk81](https://github.com/kasperk81) ([#3192](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3192))
- **LoongArch64 build support** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@4Darmygeometry](https://github.com/4Darmygeometry) ([#3198](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3198))

## Bug Fixes

- **Implement SkCanvas::SaveLayerRec** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@ahmed605](https://github.com/ahmed605) ([#2962](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/2962))

- **Disable more unused externals** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3171](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3171))
- **Reduce the unused dependencies** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3180](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3180))
- **The externals with tvOS fixes** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3186](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3186))
- **Exclude code that will never run on Apple** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3187](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3187))
- **Targets for ARM machines** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3190](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3190))
- **Vulkanmemoryallocator to 3.2.1** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@kasperk81](https://github.com/kasperk81) ([#3196](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3196))
- **Set the correct target for tvOS** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3199](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3199))
- **The SKImage.FromPicture implementation** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3231](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3231))

- **.NET 9 ASP.NET Blazor issues** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#3064](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3064))

## Preview 1 (March 31, 2025)

Preview 1 carried harfbuzz to 8.3.1; skia to Milestone 118; skia to milestone 117.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.118.0-preview.2.3...v3.119.0-preview.1.2)

## Preview 2 (December 5, 2024)

Preview 2 carried the import for apps with a base path; Move the WASM fix to SkiaSharp; Metal API for GRBackendRenderTarget to all platforms; Move the Blazor workaround into WASM; `<WindowsSdkPackageVersion>` to set the SDK version; .NET 9 ASP.NET Blazor issues; freetype2 to 2.13.3+; libexpat to v2.6.4; libjpeg_turbo to the latest commit: 2.1.5.1+commits.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.118.0-preview.1.2...v3.118.0-preview.2.3)

## Preview 1 (November 6, 2024)

Preview 1 carried harfbuzz to 8.3.1; skia to Milestone 118; skia to milestone 117.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v3.116.1...v3.118.0-preview.1.2)
